name: 无尘
bio: 无尘，道门传人，以太极之力操控空间。他冷静而深邃，以无为之道应万变，以虚空之力制敌于无形。
bio_en: Wuchen, a Taoist master who manipulates space with Tai Chi power. Calm and profound, he controls enemies with the power of the void.
story: 无尘，道门传人，以太极之力操控空间与传送。他以无为之道应万变，以虚空之力制敌于无形，是战场上最难以捉摸的存在。

skills.skill_description: 操控气力释放5把灵刃，持续1分钟。按F可射出灵刃。冷却18秒。
skills.skill_description_en: Manipulate Qi to cast 5 spirit blades that last 1 minute. Press F to shoot the blades. Cooldown: 18s.

skills.skill_description: 释放5把灵刃，可自动射向来袭的敌人。若灵刃未命中，则召唤新的灵刃，同时降低敌人能量。冷却22秒。
skills.skill_description_en: Cast 5 spirit blades that automatically shoot at incoming enemies. If a blade misses, a new one is summoned, decreasing the opponent's energy. Cooldown: 22s.

skills.skill_description: 在50米范围内放置阴阳球，持续150秒。放置后按V可提升40米范围内友军的伤害减免，并在1.5秒后传送至阴阳球处。
skills.skill_description_en: Set down a Yin Yang orb within 50m that lasts 150s. After placement, press V to increase allies' damage reduction within 40m and teleport to the orb after 1.5s.

skills.skill_description: 施放终极技能时，可与范围内的敌人交换位置，最多传送3名敌人，并使其附加「易伤」效果。
skills.skill_description_en: When casting the ultimate, switch positions with enemies in the area. Up to 3 enemies can be teleported and marked with the Vulnerable debuff.
